design-tokens-colors--docs.name: Colors
design-tokens-colors--docs.title: Design Tokens/Colors
design-tokens-colors--docs.summary: Color token system and usage guidelines
design-tokens-colors--docs.content:
# Colors

The DriveNets design system uses a semantic color token system.

## Primary
- `--dn-color-primary`: Main brand color
- `--dn-color-primary-hover`: Hover state

## Semantic
- `--dn-color-success`: Success states
- `--dn-color-warning`: Warning states
- `--dn-color-error`: Error states
- `--dn-color-info`: Informational states

getting-started--docs.name: Getting Started
getting-started--docs.title: Getting Started
getting-started--docs.summary: How to install and use the DriveNets design system
getting-started--docs.content:
# Getting Started

## Installation

```bash
pnpm add @drivenets/design-system
```

## Usage

```tsx
import { DsButton } from '@drivenets/design-system';
import '@drivenets/design-system/index.min.css';
```
